statement: During turbulent regimes, a stricter flow-plus-RSI pullback filter with trend confirmation improves short-horizon hit quality versus baseline alt-flow entries.
rationale: Geopolitical turbulence increases false breakouts and noisy volume spikes. Tightening entry thresholds (volume spike + lower RSI + trend alignment) should reduce low-quality entries while preserving reaction speed.

signal_formula.entry: BUY if (volume_t > SMA(volume,15)*1.4) AND (RSI14 <= 38) AND (close_t >= SMA(close,15))
signal_formula.exit: SELL if (RSI14 >= 57) OR (close_t < SMA(close,15)*0.992) OR stop/take reached

risk_controls.event_risk_mode: de-risk via reduced entry frequency under noisy regimes
risk_controls.hard_limits: no leverage increase; keep existing global DD guard
